steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The clause begins with the subject A recent study and needs a finite main verb. The rest of the sentence then explains what the study shows about plants making moderate-sugar nectar.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is a participle, Choice C is a perfect participle, and Choice D is an infinitive. None can serve as the main verb for the subject A recent study, so each would leave a fragment. The answer is A.
